Research Focus

Building AI systems that solve real-world problems in healthcare and financial security.

// 03. publications

Publications

2026

PhenSPINE: A Standardized Benchmark for Spine Pathology Diagnosis

Featured

Duong Ngoc Vu , Hai Son Nguyen , Trong-Nghia Nguyen , Bien Tran Van , Trang Mai Xuan , Huan Vu , Thien Van Luong

CITA 2026 · 15th Conference on Information Technology and its Applications

A standardized benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for spine pathology diagnosis, enabling fair comparison of deep learning methods on clinical MRI data.

Medical Imaging Benchmark Spine Healthcare
2026

CrossSpine: Multi-scale Cross-sequence Attention for Pfirrmann Grading

Featured

Hai Son Nguyen , Duong Ngoc Vu , Trong-Nghia Nguyen , Bien Tran Van , Van-Dem Pham , Trang Mai Xuan , Huan Vu , Thien Van Luong

CITA 2026 · 15th Conference on Information Technology and its Applications

A multi-scale cross-sequence attention framework for automated Pfirrmann grading of spinal disc degeneration from MRI images.

Medical Imaging Spine Deep Learning
DV
